scripts.start: env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env development) serverless offline start --stage development
scripts.slsPrune:test-eng-1: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env test-eng-1) node_modules/.bin/serverless prune -n 1 --verbose
scripts.slsPrune:test-eng-2: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env test-eng-2) node_modules/.bin/serverless prune -n 1 --verbose
scripts.slsPrune:staging: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env staging) node_modules/.bin/serverless prune -n 1 --verbose
scripts.slsPrune:prod-us: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env production-us) node_modules/.bin/serverless prune -n 1 --verbose
scripts.deploy:test-eng-1: yarn slsPrune:test-eng-1 && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env test-eng-1) sls deploy --stage test-eng-1 --verbose
scripts.deploy:test-eng-2: yarn slsPrune:test-eng-2 && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env test-eng-2) sls deploy --stage test-eng-2 --verbose
scripts.deploy:staging: yarn slsPrune:staging && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env staging) sls deploy --stage staging --verbose
scripts.deploy:prod-us: yarn slsPrune:prod-us && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env production-us) sls deploy --stage production-us  --verbose
scripts.package:test-eng-1: env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env test-eng-1) sls package --stage test-eng-1
scripts.package:test-eng-2: env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env test-eng-2) sls package --stage test-eng-2
scripts.package:staging: env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env staging) sls package --stage staging
scripts.package:prod-us: env-cmd -f $(node scripts/resolve-env-file.js --env production-us) sls package --stage production-us
